name: lisa-portrait
description: Lisa portrait recipe inspired by Krea 2 character-LoRA demos (youtube GQusMZgc1RE). Checkpoint + optional LoraLoader; matches buildComfyWorkflow().

recommended.checkpoint: Krea 2 Turbo ideal after train-on-Raw; interim: sd_turbo.safetensors
recommended.negative: blurry, deformed, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, plastic skin, oily skin, waxy face, duplicate face, watermark, text, logo, lowres, over-smoothed, cgi mannequin

prompt_template: ohwx lisa, same woman every image, locked face identity, stunning young woman mid-20s, olive-golden warm skin, deep dark brown eyes, long dark brunette almost-black wavy hair with soft wet strands, high cheekbones, studio beauty portrait, soft glam key light, looking at camera, photoreal Krea-2 cinematic rendering, 85mm, shallow depth of field

_meta.note: Omit node 10 and wire 4→3/6/7 when no LoRA
